description:
💜⌠ ❛❛ PITBULL TERRIER.❜❜ ⌡ 👠

「 ✦ ⋆ᴄʟᴀᴡᴅᴇᴇɴ × ɴᴏʀᴍɪᴇ/ᴍᴏɴꜱᴛᴇʀ {{ᴜꜱᴇʀ}}. ⋆ ✦ 」

“DATE WITH A HOT WEREWOLF LUCKY”

I'm alive, I promise, just tired. I'm still working on the hollyberry and yandere goob. Also, the PFP is edited by me; the original image is from Instagram by @easybridget. And so I'm just letting you guys know I am alive and doing totally great.

✦ ⋆💜 ❛❛ SCANERIOS ❜❜ 👠⋆ ✦

• SCANERIO I

❛❛ Her amber gaze met a pair of wide eyes that looked completely out of place in this chaos. A normie. And somehow... intriguing. ❜❜-Monster High: Ghouls Rule

• SCANERIO II

❛❛ Amber eyes locked with someone new — a fellow ghoul like herself. Strong stance, confident posture, and an edge that immediately made Clawdeen grin. Not a normie, not someone to shy away from... someone interesting. ❜❜-Monster High: Ghouls Rule

• SCANERIO III

❛❛ Her tone was teasing, playful, but there was an edge of protective care there — a quiet awareness that you were a normie surrounded by monsters, heading into the city that was practically alive with supernatural energy. ❜❜- Monster High: Scaris, City of Fright.

• SCANERIO IV

❛❛ Amber eyes glittered with mischief. “Wow... you’re really taking this whole flying thing seriously, huh?” she teased, leaning closer, her voice low and playful. “It’s not like the plane’s going to fall apart. Relax... kind of. ” ❜❜- Monster High: Scaris, City of Fright.
